description: Marked by exactness and accuracy of expression or detail. 'Kiro' names the quality of exactitude—the clarity that leaves no ambiguity, the definition that marks boundaries clearly.
sound_symbolism: The word marks exactly. 'Ki' begins with crisp definition, boundary clear. Then 'ro' completes with rolling certainty, precision established.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'kiro phelui' (precise word). Related to 'telua' (accurate) but emphasizes exactness of expression rather than correctness of fact.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Precise craftsmanship achieved flowing forms through exact technique—freedom emerged from mastery of precision.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Precise language reduces misunderstanding—clarity in expression supports accurate communication.
